focus: Q3: Port the 120/003 eval-rig scorer and 5-dim rubric — decouple deterministic checks + claude grader harness from fixture-only assumptions

label: Two separate scoring code paths: score-variant.cjs (120/003 D1-D5) and run-benchmark.cjs (benchmark pattern-match). No shared scorer seam.

Three fixture coupling points in score-variant.cjs: CP1=scoreAcceptanceDeterministic reads fixture.acceptance[]; CP2=det-check scripts receive fixturePath as argv; CP3=harness.gradeD4 receives full fixture object
forbiddenPatterns dimension unique to benchmark mode (cleanScore 20pts) absent from 120/003 rubric. D1-D5 vs heading/pattern/clean dimension mismatch.

Det-check scripts (bundle-gate, cwd-check, preplanning, hallucinationFlag) are second-order fixture-coupled — they read fixture JSON internally. Require explicit --cwd parameterization for agent-improvement mode.
Backward-compat invariant: loop.cjs --run-with-mode=agent-improvement must produce byte-identical state JSONL as mode-absent. Scorer must default to agent-improvement behavior.
Scorer seam contract: score(outputText, ctx, mode) — scorer NEVER reads fixture JSON directly; loop host extracts primitives and passes them
